summary: Iteration 12 Testing: 5 New Public Website UI Features - All 11 tests passed (100%). Tested: 1) Floating WhatsApp button, 2) Scroll-to-top button, 3) Google Maps embed, 4) Reviews carousel, 5) Social media links. All features working correctly on both desktop and mobile.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Floating WhatsApp button (data-testid='floating-whatsapp-btn') visible on right side, green (#25D366), position fixed
TEST 2a: Scroll-to-top button correctly hidden when at top of page
TEST 2b: Scroll-to-top button (data-testid='scroll-to-top-btn') appears after scrolling 400px, gold color (#D4AF37)
TEST 2c: Scroll-to-top button scrolls to top on click (scrollY went from 800 to 2)
TEST 3: Google Maps iframe (data-testid='google-map') visible in Contact section with correct src
TEST 4: 'Apri in Google Maps' button (data-testid='map-directions-btn') visible with correct href to maps.google.com
TEST 5a: Reviews carousel (data-testid='reviews-carousel') visible with 3 review cards displayed
TEST 5b: Carousel dots (data-testid='carousel-dots') visible with 6 dots, clickable navigation works
TEST 6: Social media links in Contact section - all 4 present with correct URLs (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube)
TEST 7: Footer social links - all 4 present with correct URLs (footer-instagram, footer-facebook, footer-tiktok, footer-youtube)
TEST 8: Mobile CTA bar visible at bottom with 'Prenota ora' button
TEST 9: Booking modal opens correctly from 'Prenota ora' button, displays service categories
TEST 10: WhatsApp button positioned at bottom-80px on mobile to avoid CTA bar overlap
TEST 11: Reviews carousel auto-rotates (active dot changed from 0 to 1 after 5 seconds)
critical_code_review_comments: WebsitePage.jsx: Scroll listener at lines 150-154 properly adds/removes event listener with cleanup
WebsitePage.jsx: WhatsApp button (lines 324-335) and scroll-to-top button (lines 337-348) positioned correctly with z-50
ContactSection.jsx: SOCIAL array (lines 3-12) correctly includes all 4 platforms including TikTok custom SVG icon
ContactSection.jsx: Google Maps iframe (lines 92-103) uses proper embed URL with API key and address encoding
ReviewsSection.jsx: Auto-rotate interval at 4500ms (lines 11-16), cleanup on unmount
ReviewsSection.jsx: Touch support for swipe navigation (lines 27-33)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 tested 5 new public website UI features: 1) Floating WhatsApp button (green, fixed right, opens wa.me), 2) Scroll-to-top button (gold, appears after 400px scroll, hidden at top), 3) Google Maps embed in Contact section with 'Apri in Google Maps' button, 4) Reviews carousel with auto-rotate (4.5s), dots navigation, touch swipe support, 5) Social media links (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube) in both Contact section and Footer. Mobile CTA bar and booking modal continue to work correctly. All features use proper data-testid attributes.
